text:
In the first scene, I feel a curious sense of anticipation standing outside the glass-encased room—its cleanliness and order hint at contemplation and learning, yet the emptiness amplifies my awareness of my own presence and purpose. 

In the second scene, the bold, colorful wall about research and development fuels my philosophical imagination. I am drawn into the interplay between science, technology, and the human quest to understand and co-exist with intelligent machines. It is energizing and thought-provoking, as if I am standing on the edge of human inquiry itself.
